title: Bodies of Four Italian Divers Found in Maldives Cave
summary_full: The discovery comes after days of searching by an international team of rescue divers. A fifth body was recovered last week.
summary_public: The discovery comes after days of searching by an international team of rescue divers. A fifth body was recovered last week.
